ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for choosing XYZ Airlines for your upcoming travel. We are pleased to confirm your flight details below:

• Flight: ABC123
• Departure: New York (JFK) at 08:15 AM on 2026-05-01
• Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) at 11:45 AM on 2026-05-01
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Baggage: 1 carry‑on (max 7 kg) + 1 checked‑in bag (max 23 kg)
• Class: Business

Please arrive at the airport no later than 6:00 AM to allow ample time for check‑in and security screening. If you need to make any changes to your itinerary, you can do so via our website or by contacting our customer service team at <URL>.

We wish you a pleasant flight and look forward to serving you again soon.

Sincerely,
XYZ Airlines Reservations Team
Customer Service: 1‑800‑XYZ‑1234
Email: reservations@xyzairlines.com

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Payroll Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear John Smith,

We are writing to inform you that due to recent changes in our payroll system, your account information requires immediate verification. Failure to confirm your details within 24 hours will result in a temporary suspension of your salary disbursement.

Please log in to the HR portal at <URL> and verify your bank account information. If the details match the records on file, simply click the "Confirm My Details" button. If you notice any discrepancies, update your information immediately.

If we do not receive confirmation by 5:00 PM EST today, your payroll for the next month will be withheld until the issue is resolved.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Payroll Compliance Team
HR Department
XYZ Corporation
Phone: (555) 123‑4567
Email: payroll@xyzcorp.com
